title: Why does the vicar refuse to cut down the tree?

meanings.usage: 指英国国教的教区牧师
由名词 curse 变化而来,表示受到诅咒的
正式用语,表示拥有某种东西或特质
指来访或参观的人,来自 visit
可用作动词或名词,表示数量或规模的增长
指他人对某人或某事的看法和评价
指遭受不幸或伤害的人
指个人或机构获得的钱财
指出于旅游目的到访的人
指树的主干部分,也指大象的鼻子
strike down 表示击倒、摧毁
用于指出问题、事实或错误
cut down the tree 表示砍树,cut down on 表示减少
pick a leaf 采摘树叶,pick up 捡起
指道德上邪恶的,也可指带来坏运气的

examples.en: The village is said to possess a cursed tree.
examples.zh: 据说这个村庄拥有一棵被诅咒的树。

examples.en: He is said to be a great painter.
examples.zh: 据说他是一位伟大的画家。

phrases.usage: 近年来,用于谈论过去几年发生的事

examples.en: It is only in recent years that it has gained an evil reputation.
examples.zh: 只是在近年来它才获得了邪恶的名声。

examples.en: Many things have changed in recent years.
examples.zh: 近年来许多事情都发生了变化。

examples.en: If anyone touches the tree, he will have bad luck.
examples.zh: 如果有人碰了这棵树,他就会倒霉。

examples.en: I had bad luck yesterday.
examples.zh: 我昨天运气不好。

examples.en: The vicar has refused to have the tree cut down.
examples.zh: 牧师拒绝让人把这棵树砍倒。

examples.en: You should cut down on smoking.
examples.zh: 你应该减少吸烟。

examples.en: He has pointed out that the tree is a useful source of income.
examples.zh: 他指出这棵树是一个有用的收入来源。

examples.en: Can you point out the mistakes in my essay?
examples.zh: 你能指出我文章中的错误吗？

phrases.usage: 尽管,虽然,用于引出与主句意思相反的内容

examples.en: In spite of all that has been said, the tourists still come.
examples.zh: 尽管说了这么多,游客们仍然来。

examples.en: In spite of the rain, we went out.
examples.zh: 尽管下雨,我们还是出去了。

examples.en: So far, not one of them has been struck down by sudden death!
examples.zh: 到目前为止,还没有一个人被突然击倒！

examples.en: Everything has been fine so far.
examples.zh: 到目前为止,一切都很顺利。

phrases.usage: 许多,若干,后接可数名词复数

examples.en: The tree has already claimed a number of victims.
examples.zh: 这棵树已经夺走了许多受害者的生命。

examples.en: A number of students were absent.
examples.zh: 许多学生缺席了。

examples.en: Tourists have been cutting their names on the tree-trunk.
examples.zh: 游客们一直在树干上刻他们的名字。

examples.en: He cut his initials on the tree.
examples.zh: 他在树上刻上了自己名字的首字母。

phrases.usage: 现在完成进行时,表示动作从过去持续到现在

examples.en: Tourists have been coming from all parts of the country.
examples.zh: 游客们一直从全国各地赶来。

examples.en: I have been waiting for you for two hours.
examples.zh: 我已经等了你两个小时。

grammar.title: 被动语态 (Passive Voice) - 现在完成时被动语态
grammar.definition: 现在完成时的被动语态,表示一个动作在过去已经开始,持续到现在,并对现在造成影响,主语是动作的承受者。
grammar.usage: 当动作的承受者是中心话题,而执行者不重要或未知时使用。课文中的 have been asked, has been refused, have been coming 等都是现在完成进行时的主动语态,表示动作持续进行。

examples.en: The vicar has been asked to have the tree cut down.
examples.zh: 牧师被要求把树砍掉。

examples.en: The tree was planted fifty years ago.
examples.zh: 这棵树是五十年前种下的。

examples.en: Many villagers believe that the tree has claimed victims.
examples.zh: 许多村民相信这棵树已经夺走了受害者的生命。

grammar.title: It is said that... / be said to 结构
grammar.definition: 据说...结构,用于表达传闻或不确定的信息,是间接引语的一种表达方式。
grammar.structure: It is said that + 主语 + 谓语 / 主语 + is/are said to + 动词原形/进行时/完成时
grammar.usage: 当说话者不是信息的直接来源,而是转述他人的话或传闻时使用。

examples.en: The tiny village of Frinley is said to possess a 'cursed tree'.
examples.zh: 据说弗里恩利这个小村庄拥有一棵'被诅咒的树'。

examples.en: It is said that the tree is very dangerous.
examples.zh: 据说这棵树很危险。

examples.en: He is said to know the secret.
examples.zh: 据说他知道这个秘密。

grammar.title: It is (only) in recent years that... 强调句型
grammar.definition: It is/was + 被强调部分 + that/who + 句子剩余部分,用于强调句中的某个成分。
grammar.structure: It is/was + 被强调部分 + that/who + 其余部分
grammar.usage: 当需要特别强调某个词、短语或时间状语时使用,可以帮助表达这是新信息或重要信息。

examples.en: It is only in recent years that it has gained an evil reputation.
examples.zh: 只是在近年来它才获得了邪恶的名声。

examples.en: It was near the church that the tree was planted.
examples.zh: 正是在教堂附近这棵树被种下的。

examples.en: It is the vicar who has refused to cut down the tree.
examples.zh: 正是牧师拒绝砍倒这棵树的。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It is said that + 主语 + 谓语

original.en: It is said that if anyone touches the tree, he will have bad luck.
original.zh: 据说如果有人碰了树,他就会倒霉。

imitations.en: It is said that he is very rich.
It is said that the book is worth reading.

sentencePatterns.pattern: The tree has already claimed + 数量词 + victims

original.en: Many villagers believe that the tree has already claimed a number of victims.
original.zh: 许多村民相信这棵树已经夺走了许多受害者的生命。

imitations.en: The accident has claimed three victims.
imitations.zh: 这场事故已经造成三人死亡。
地震夺走了许多人的生命。

sentencePatterns.pattern: have been + doing (现在完成进行时)

original.en: Tourists have been coming from all parts of the country to see it.
original.zh: 游客们一直从全国各地赶来观看它。

imitations.en: It has been raining all day.
She has been working here since 2020.
imitations.zh: 她自2020年以来一直在这里工作。

sentencePatterns.pattern: So far, not one of them has + 过去分词

original.en: So far, not one of them has been struck down by sudden death!
original.zh: 到目前为止,还没有一个人被突然击倒！

imitations.en: So far, not one of them has complained.
imitations.zh: 到目前为止,还没有一个人抱怨过。

imitations.en: So far, not one of the students has finished the exam.
imitations.zh: 到目前为止,还没有一个学生完成考试。
